creator: liangtai.s16@gmail.com
text:
gimp-help-2.8.1 had been released.  The attached patch file
"gimp-help-2.8-update.diff" removes a port (polish/gimp-help),
and changes 13 existing ports (chinese/gimp-help-zh_CN,
french/gimp-help, german/gimp-help, graphics/gimp-help,
japanese/gimp-help, korean/gimp-help, misc/gimp-help-en,
misc/gimp-help-es, misc/gimp-help-it, misc/gimp-help-nl,
misc/gimp-help-nn, misc/gimp-help-sv, and russian/gimp-help).
The attached shar file "gimp-help-2.8-update.shar) adds 5 ports
(misc/gimp-help-ca, misc/gimp-help-da, misc/gimp-help-el,
misc/gimp-help-sl, and portuguese/gimp-help-pt_BR) and a
patch file "russian/gimp-help/files/patch-glossary.po",
Then misc/Makefile, polish/Makefile, and portuguese/Makefile
should be updated; this change can be done with the attached
patch file "portstree.diff".
